topics.title: Film Festival Recap
topics.summary: The studio discusses the events of a recent film festival, including the quality of the entries, interactions with guests like Richard Christie, and media coverage from various news outlets.

topics.title: Howard Stern Film Festival and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the launch of the Howard Stern Film Festival, upcoming media appearances by various celebrities, and personal anecdotes regarding interactions with fans and colleagues.

topics.title: Film Festival and Television Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the chaotic atmosphere of a recent film festival, rumors regarding Beth's appearance on Dancing with the Stars, and various television performances.

topics.title: Cabbie's Prison Status and Literary Interests
topics.summary: The studio discusses Cabbie's current incarceration in a psychiatric unit, his request for mail and classic literature like Walt Whitman, and the difficulties of communicating with him from outside.

topics.title: Film Festival Recap and Guest Disputes
topics.summary: The studio reviews the results of a recent film festival, discusses various staff members' performances, and addresses allegations regarding guest behavior and disputes over prizes.

topics.title: Film Festival Winner Interview and Guest Segment
topics.summary: The studio discusses the results of a film festival, interviews winner Scott Matherson about his production process and prizes, and features a comedic segment with Coach Mike regarding his invention.

topics.title: JJ Abrams Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts JJ Abrams to discuss his career in television, including his work on Felicity and Lost, as well as his education at Sarah Lawrence College.

topics.title: Development and Production of Lost
topics.summary: The studio details the creative process behind the television series Lost, including its origins from a pitch by Lloyd Braun, the collaborative writing with Damon Lindelof, and the management of complex narrative threads.

topics.title: J.J. Abrams and Hollywood Experiences
topics.summary: The studio features J.J. Abrams discussing his career milestones, including turning down a project with Steven Spielberg to work on Lost, his interactions with Tom Cruise, and the complexities of managing high-profile actors.

topics.title: Mission Impossible 3 Production Details
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding the production of Mission Impossible 3, including its high budget, the creative process with Tom Cruise, and the development of the film's script.

topics.title: Film Festival Conflict and Guest Confrontations
topics.summary: The studio features a heated confrontation between several guests regarding allegations of sneaking people into an after-party, followed by discussions about film festival results and personal interactions.

topics.title: Film Festival Results and Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses the outcomes of a film festival, debating the judging criteria for various entries and reviewing specific scenes from the winning production.

topics.title: Staff Film Festival and Listener Interactions
topics.summary: The studio reviews highlights from a staff film festival, discusses upcoming segments regarding local news and listener reports, and features a heated interaction with a caller named "Crazy Alice" before concluding with a segment on fan reactions to a recent stunt.

topics.title: Richard's Secret Collaboration and Hygiene
topics.summary: The studio explores Richard's personal hygiene, his secret professional partnership with Howard on a television project, and the resulting tension regarding their private interactions.

topics.title: Repetitive Greeting
topics.summary: The show consists of a continuous, repetitive phrase regarding daily greetings.

topics.title: Music Industry and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses the rise of K-Fed, Neil Young's protest album, 50 Cent's critique of Oprah Winfrey, and current gas prices.

topics.title: Gas Prices and Current Events
topics.summary: The show covers rising gasoline prices due to supply issues, the film Flight 93, celebrity news regarding Rosie O'Donnell and George Clooney, and a discussion on Iraq troop levels.
